description:
Secure remote access and support

TeamViewer is a comprehensive, remote access, remote control and remote support solution that works with almost every desktop and mobile platform, including Windows, macOS, Android, and iOS.
TeamViewer lets you remote in to computers or mobile devices located anywhere in the world and use them as though you were there.
New Features
- Users can now configure AI‑generated session summaries so that data is logged only when the supporter triggers the summary during the session. In this mode, both the supporter and the remote user can stop data collection at any time.

Improvements
- The MSI package now installs the new UI by default for both full client and Host. A new MSI command‑line parameter is available to enforce the classic UI.
- TeamViewer client module downloads are now available in 64‑bit by default. For systems that do not support 64‑bit, the download automatically falls back to the 32‑bit version.
- Company administrators with TeamViewer Tensor can now enable the new UI for selected user groups.
- A new TeamViewer policy setting has been introduced to enforce the use of the TLS 1.3 connection protocol.
- Fixed a bug that prevented the TeamViewer application from being run as administrator by a non‑administrator account.
- Improved error handling for failed policy assignments on devices. Users now receive clearer feedback when a policy cannot be applied.

Bugfixes
- Fixed a bug where the profile picture was not displayed in the confirmation dialog when connecting to a managed device.
- Fixed a bug where devices were displayed twice in the basic view.
